title: How Preply combines AI and human tutors to personalize learning
author: openai-blog
raw_description: Preply uses OpenAI to launch AI-generated lesson summaries, providing personalised feedback and language learning exercises.
summary: Preply利用OpenAI技术，结合AI与真人导师，生成课程摘要、个性化反馈和语言学习练习，提升学习效果。
analysis_note: 有价值的LLM应用，结合AI与人工提升学习体验，但技术深度一般，偏向商业化。
